description: A monochrome engraving depicting the Winter Palace of Peter I in Saint Petersburg. The grand baroque palace is shown from the front, featuring a symmetrical facade with a central portico, prominent pediment, multiple windows, and flanking wings. In the foreground, a busy scene unfolds with horse-drawn carriages, pedestrians, and figures going about their daily activities. Along the bottom edge, boats are visible on the river, including a long rowing vessel. The sky is rendered with hatched clouds typical of period engravings.

_meta.title: St. Petersburg. View of the Winter Palace of Peter I.
